name: Testing authorisation with wrong email or wrong password

steps.name: Opening URL https://nikita-filonov.github.io/qa-automation-engineer-ui-course/#/auth/login
Login with email and password
Getting locator with "data-testid=login-form-email-input" at index" 0"

Fill <bound method Input.type_of of <elements.input.Input object at 0x10851a120>> with name email by email1 and "data-testid=<Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://nikita-filonov.github.io/qa-automation-engineer-ui-course/#/auth/login'> selector='internal:testid=[data-testid="login-form-email-input"s] >> nth=0 >> input'>" at index" 0"
Getting locator with "data-testid=login-form-password-input" at index" 0"
